symbols.name: SpecificationResolver
symbols.summary: Provides methods to register, resolve, and manage specifications for entities. Used by the SpecificationBuilder to resolve specifications by name.

symbols.name: Register(string)
symbols.summary: Registers a specification for a given entity type with an optional name.

syntax.content: public static void Register(string name = null) where TEntity : class, IEntity where TSpecification : ISpecification

parameters.description: The name of the specification. If not provided, the specification type name is used.
The name of the specification. If not provided, the specification type name is used.

symbols.name: Register(Type, string)
symbols.summary: Registers a specification type for a given entity type with an optional name.

syntax.content: public static void Register(Type specificationType, string name = null) where TEntity : class, IEntity

parameters.description: An optional name for the specification. If not provided, the name of the specification type will be used.
An optional name for the specification. If not provided, the name of the specification type will be used.

symbols.name: Resolve(object[])
symbols.summary: Resolve a registered specification for the given entity type using provided arguments.

syntax.content: public static ISpecification Resolve(object[] arguments) where TEntity : class, IEntity

parameters.description: The arguments to be passed to the specification's constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the specification for the given entity type.

parameters.description: The arguments to be passed to the specification's constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the specification for the given entity type.

symbols.name: Resolve(string, object[])
symbols.summary: Resolves a specification of type BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.ISpecification%601 for the specified entity type and arguments.

syntax.content: public static ISpecification Resolve(string name, object[] arguments) where TEntity : class, IEntity

parameters.description: The name of the specification to resolve.
The arguments to pass to the specification's constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the resolved specification.

parameters.description: The name of the specification to resolve.
The arguments to pass to the specification's constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the resolved specification.

symbols.name: IsRegistered(string)
symbols.summary: Determines if a specification with the given name is registered.

parameters.description: The name of the specification to check.

returns.description: True if a specification with the given name is registered; otherwise, false.

parameters.description: The name of the specification to check.

returns.description: True if a specification with the given name is registered; otherwise, false.

symbols.name: GetType(string)
symbols.summary: Retrieves the type of the specification registered with the specified name.

parameters.description: The name of the registered specification.

returns.description: The type of the registered specification.

parameters.description: The name of the registered specification.

returns.description: The type of the registered specification.
